'''âj-s-d''' ('''kajasad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hitchhike|hitchhike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hitchhike|hitchhike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-s-d
|-
! Lemma
| kajasad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijasad|thijasad]] || [[word:jijasad|jijasad]] || [[word:shijasad|shijasad]] || [[word:kijasad|kijasad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujasad|thuthujasad]] || [[word:jujujasad|jujujasad]] || [[word:shushujasad|shushujasad]] || [[word:kukujasad|kukujasad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujasad|thujasad]] || [[word:jujasad|jujasad]] || [[word:shujasad|shujasad]] || [[word:kujasad|kujasad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujasad|thujasad]] || [[word:jujasad|jujasad]] || [[word:shujasad|shujasad]] || [[word:kujasad|kujasad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejasad|thejasad]] || [[word:jejasad|jejasad]] || [[word:shejasad|shejasad]] || [[word:kejasad|kejasad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojasad|thothojasad]] || [[word:jojojasad|jojojasad]] || [[word:shoshojasad|shoshojasad]] || [[word:kokojasad|kokojasad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojasad|thojasad]] || [[word:jojasad|jojasad]] || [[word:shojasad|shojasad]] || [[word:kojasad|kojasad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojasad|thojasad]] || [[word:jojasad|jojasad]] || [[word:shojasad|shojasad]] || [[word:kojasad|kojasad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjasad|thĂŠjasad]] || [[word:jĂŠjasad|jĂŠjasad]] || [[word:shĂŠjasad|shĂŠjasad]] || [[word:kĂŠjasad|kĂŠjasad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajasad|thathajasad]] || [[word:jajajasad|jajajasad]] || [[word:shashajasad|shashajasad]] || [[word:kakajasad|kakajasad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajasad|thajasad]] || [[word:jajasad|jajasad]] || [[word:shajasad|shajasad]] || [[word:kajasad|kajasad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajasad|thajasad]] || [[word:jajasad|jajasad]] || [[word:shajasad|shajasad]] || [[word:kajasad|kajasad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajasad|shajasad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajasad|goshajasad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajasad|gokishajasad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajasadnĂŒ|shajasadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajasadnknĂŒ|goshajasadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasadnĂŒ|gokishajasadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajasadshĂ«|shajasadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajasadnkshĂ«|goshajasadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajasadshĂ«|gokishajasadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasadro|shajasadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasadnkro|goshajasadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasadro|gokishajasadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasadmu|shajasadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasadnkmu|goshajasadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasadmu|gokishajasadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajasadsher|shajasadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajasadnksher|goshajasadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajasadsher|gokishajasadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajasadng|shajasadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajasadnkng|goshajasadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajasadng|gokishajasadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajasadya|shajasadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajasadnkya|goshajasadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajasadya|gokishajasadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajasadyam|shajasadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajasadnkyam|goshajasadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajasadyam|gokishajasadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajasadnĂŒshĂ«|shajasadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajasadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajasadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajasadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajasadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasadnĂŒro|shajasadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasadnknĂŒro|goshajasadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasadnĂŒro|gokishajasadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasadnĂŒmu|shajasadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasadnknĂŒmu|goshajasadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasadnĂŒmu|gokishajasadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajasadshĂ«nĂŒ|shajasadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajasadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajasadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajasadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasadshĂ«ro|shajasadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasadnkshĂ«ro|goshajasadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasadshĂ«ro|gokishajasadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasadshĂ«mu|shajasadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasadnkshĂ«mu|goshajasadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasadshĂ«mu|gokishajasadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajasadronĂŒ|shajasadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajasadnkronĂŒ|goshajasadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasadronĂŒ|gokishajasadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajasadroshĂ«|shajasadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajasadnkroshĂ«|goshajasadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajasadroshĂ«|gokishajasadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasadromu|shajasadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasadnkromu|goshajasadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasadromu|gokishajasadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajasadmunĂŒ|shajasadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajasadnkmunĂŒ|goshajasadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasadmunĂŒ|gokishajasadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajasadmushĂ«|shajasadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajasadnkmushĂ«|goshajasadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajasadmushĂ«|gokishajasadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasadmuro|shajasadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasadnkmuro|goshajasadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasadmuro|gokishajasadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
